# pihole_dns_records (Data Source)

Fetches all DNS records.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pihole_dns_records" "all" {}

output "all_dns_records" {
  value = data.pihole_dns_records.all.records
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `records` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `domain` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip` (String)
